layers.label: Input
layers.covers: Prompts, RAG context, files, and request inputs that reach the system.

layers.label: Output
layers.covers: Model and system responses and how they are handled downstream.

layers.label: Model
layers.covers: The model itself, training data, and embeddings.

layers.label: Infrastructure
layers.covers: APIs, keys, hosting, accounts, and rate limits around the system.

layers.label: Agentic
layers.covers: Tools, autonomy, and multi-step actions an agent can take.

layers.label: Governance
layers.covers: Policy, risk management, accountability, and lifecycle controls.
